name: ethara-evalops-demo
description: Full-stack LLM evaluation operations demo for AI post-training workflows.

scripts.dev:windows: start "EvalOps API" cmd /k "cd /d C:\Users\user\Desktop\RAGUdemy\server && npm.cmd run dev" && start "EvalOps UI" cmd /k "cd /d C:\Users\user\Desktop\RAGUdemy\client && npm.cmd run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
